creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to timp87 from comment #7)
> > I'm halfway considering doing the same thing with ECAP using
> > OPTIONS_EXCLUDE= if FreeBSD 10+
> 
> What if compiler is gcc and platform is FreeBSD 10?


Right now, I proposed the same thing your patch is doing.
I don't know if I like the idea of a different compiler depending on the options selected.  I already thought about "USE_GCC=any" in this case but thought it was not a good idea.
